  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Structure
    Structures are the root elements in every script.
    Structure.Priority
    Priorities are used to determine the order in which Structures should be loaded.
    Structure.StructureData
     
    StructureInfo<E extends Structure>
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Use DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure (DefaultSyntaxInfos.Structure.builder(Class)) instead.
